name: lodestar
description: Turn rough ideas into clear product direction, approved previews, and finished AI-built products.

interface.shortDescription: Shape an idea, preview it, then build it with AI.
interface.longDescription: Lodestar helps users turn rough product ideas into clear direction, approved previews, and finished AI-built products. It keeps the user focused on product choices while the internal workflow handles planning, implementation, testing, review, fixes, and proof.
capabilities: AI-assisted build, test, review, and fix loop
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Lodestar to turn my rough idea into a clear product direction, show me a preview, then build and verify it.
